data.description: Under Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer's supervision, a number of employees are currently being probed for official misconduct.

data.title: Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Shoots Up As CEO Terry Green Reveals Stock Acquisition: What You Should Know
data.description: Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) experienced a surge in after-hours trading on Wednesday, with shares increasing by 9.25% to $27.50. This spike was driven by insider buying, as President and CEO Jeffrey Terry Green acquired 6,398,089 Class A common shares between Mar. 2 and Mar. 4. Of these shares, 6,000,000 were purchased through a limited partnership, while 398,089 were obtained via a restricted stock award. The acquired shares were bought at weighted average prices ranging from $23.49 to $25.08, with individual transaction prices between $22.93 and $25.25. The total value of these transactions amounted to...

data.title: Basys.ai CEO Amber Nigam Recognized Among Top Healthcare Technology CEOs of 2025
data.description: Boston-based company Basys.ai shared exciting news today, revealing that their CEO and co-founder, Amber Nigam, has been esteemed as one of the Top Healthcare Technology CEOs of 2025. This recognition emphasizes Basys.ai's role in developing dependable AI systems tailored for regulated healthcare processes. The award showcases Nigam's leadership in steering the company towards success in the sector. The achievement serves as a testament to Basys.ai's dedication to innovation in healthcare technology and their commitment to excellence.

data.title: South L.A. Residents Gain 37 New Affordable Homes as Eleos and Health Net Break Ground at 5637 S. Broadway
data.description: A recent project in South Los Angeles is set to provide increased housing stability for low-income households. The initiative, a collaboration between Eleos and Health Net, has begun construction on new accommodations. This development will particularly benefit residents in the region by offering long-term housing solutions. The project aims to address the growing need for affordable housing in South Los Angeles, where many families struggle with housing insecurity. This endeavor signifies a significant step towards ensuring more individuals have access to stable and secure housing.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, AI Chip Giant Broadcom Jumps After Stock Market Rallies
data.description: On Wednesday, the stock market saw a strong rally despite major indexes remaining below their 50-day moving averages. Late earnings report from Broadcom surpassed expectations. Following the rally, Dow Jones Futures witnessed a decline, while the AI chip giant Broadcom experienced a significant jump in its stock value. The post highlights the fluctuating market trends and the notable performance of Broadcom following the recent stock market rally.
